name: spades-anywhere
description: SPADES for non-coding agents — same six-phase loop (Scope, Plan, Approve, Do, Evaluate, Ship), same Linear / local backends, same HTML mode, but adapted for real-world human tasks rather than code work. Runs in Claude Desktop, ChatGPT, the Claude web app, and mobile clients. No SCM, no PR lifecycle — Do is a marker; Evaluate is a human verdict against acceptance criteria; Ship is a confirmation walk through the project's INTENT success criteria.
